overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person exploration of a neon-lit rooftop terrace at dusk. The camera circles around NPCs seated on concrete benches before moving toward the railing to overlook a sprawling futuristic metropolis filled with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk rooftop terrace with outdoor seating

character in dark hoodie crouching beside bench using a glowing handheld device

black metal safety railing along the terrace edge
towering skyscrapers covered in glowing neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a cyberpunk rooftop terrace at dusk, circling around NPCs seated on a concrete bench. A character in a yellow shirt smokes while another in a dark hoodie uses a device. White umbrellas and a bright yellow building stand to the left, while the neon-lit city skyline rises in the background beyond the metal railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: camera moves past the seated group toward the terrace railing
perspective shifts from character focus to panoramic view of the cyberpunk cityscape

agents.ego_description: moving along the railing to overlook the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis

notable_agents.action: character with bright green hair and patterned jacket sitting on bench

entered.detail: rectangular planters with small trees and greenery along the terrace edge
red illuminated bridge structure visible in the distance between skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Moving past the seated NPCs toward the terrace railing, the camera shifts focus to the panoramic cyberpunk cityscape. The concrete bench with the smoking character moves to the left as potted plants and a distant red bridge come into view. The neon billboards of the metropolis dominate the horizon, glowing against the darkening dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an intimate rooftop gathering to a sweeping panoramic view of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by circling around NPCs seated on a concrete bench, capturing a character in a yellow shirt smoking and another in a dark hoodie using a device beside white umbrellas and a bright yellow building. As the camera moves past the seated figures, the focus shifts away from the immediate terrace and toward the metal railing. The scene then expands to reveal a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape, with the concrete bench sliding to the left to make room for potted plants and a distant red bridge. Finally, the horizon opens up to be dominated by glowing neon billboards and towering skyscrapers set against the darkening dusk sky.
